title: Solar
description: A minecraft mod about solar energy
body:
Welcome to Solar Mod.This mod was developed for the Fabric Loader(Currently, there is only version 1.19.2, and later versions such as 1.18.2 and higher will be updated).In this mod, silicon and solar items are added, and solar items can be crafting.If you think this mod is good, please follow it and share it with more people!

## Future plans
- Add more content related to power generation
- Let solar energy products generate electricity
- Interconnecting power and kinetic energy
